title: rubus hirtus var. foreziacus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. foreziacus, also known as the Forest Raspberry or Forest Black Raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. foreziacus include its ability to reduce fever, ease respiratory issues, and support wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots have been used separately for different medicinal purposes.
